title: Code 33 Naval Engineering Focus Area
description: The Naval Materials S&T Division supports basic and applied research and advanced development in the physical sciences and engineering, materials and processing, and environmental quality that enable enhanced performance, affordability, survivability, and reliability for future and legacy Navy and Marine Corps systems and platforms.
text:
The Naval Engineering Focus Area addresses the design, fabrication, integration and operation of ground and sea naval warfare platforms, sensors, weapons, networks and countermeasures to maximize their operational availability and effectiveness.​
Naval Engineering Focus Area Lead:
Dr. Greg Orris
gregory.j.orris.civ@us.navy.mil
